success.title: Successfully Unsubscribed
success.message: You have been removed from our marketing email list. You will no longer receive promotional emails from us.
success.note: Note: You will still receive transactional emails related to your orders (purchase confirmations, song deliveries, etc.).

missing_params.title: Invalid Link
missing_params.message: The unsubscribe link is invalid or incomplete. Please use the link provided in the email.

invalid_token.title: Invalid Link
invalid_token.message: This unsubscribe link is invalid or has expired. Please use a link from a recent email.

server_error.title: Something Went Wrong
server_error.message: We were unable to process your request. Please try again or contact support.

landing.title: Email Preferences
landing.message: Use the link in your email to manage your subscription preferences.

seo.title: Unsubscribe | Apollo Song
seo.description: Manage your email subscription preferences for Apollo Song.
